# UC-19.1.49 · Dell VxRail Secure Remote Services / Support Connectivity Degradation

## Description

VxRail proactive support and automated log collection depend on outbound connectivity through SRS or Secure Connect Gateway. A silent failure delays Dell’s visibility into hardware faults and can slow RMA workflows.

## Value

Restores vendor telemetry paths so predictive disk and node events still reach Dell support without manual bundle uploads.

## Implementation

Poll VxRail Manager for SRS/SCG configuration health or ingest gateway appliance logs. Normalize heartbeat epoch fields. Alert when status is not connected or heartbeat age exceeds your change window. Document firewall allow lists in the implementation runbook.

## SPL

```spl
index=vxrail sourcetype="vxrail:support_gateway" earliest=-24h
| eval hb_age_sec=now()-last_successful_heartbeat
| where srs_status!="connected" OR hb_age_sec>86400 OR isnotnull(proxy_error)
| stats latest(srs_status) as link, max(hb_age_sec) as max_gap_sec, values(proxy_error) as proxy_err by cluster_id
| sort -max_gap_sec
```

## Visualization

Table (cluster link status), Single value (clusters with stale heartbeat), Timeline (status transitions).

## References

- [Dell — Secure Connect Gateway documentation](https://www.dell.com/support/kbdoc/en-us/000180095/dell-emc-secure-connect-gateway-scg-product-documentation)
